title: Update edhoc_kdf implementation to accept (prk, th, label_str, context, len) and fix CBOR info construction
close_reason: Updated edhoc_kdf CBOR info construction for length/TH/label/context to exactly match Python cbor2 and C zcbor (tstr for string labels). Fixed missing label_bytes.extend and incorrect 0x18->0x78 header. Updated RFC test vector for KEYSTREAM_2 to independent Python oracle. Only staged/committed the edhoc.rs change.
